switcher.label: Organization
switcher.noMemberships: You aren't a member of any organization yet.

accessMode.platformOverrideDescription: You're acting on this organization as a platform admin. You aren't a member — owners and other members won't see you on the team.

removed.title: Organization unavailable
removed.description: It may have been deleted or your membership was removed.

edit.title: Organization details
edit.description: Change the display name or the URL slug.

slug.label: Slug
slug.hint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and single hyphens.
slug.invalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and single hyphens. No leading or trailing hyphens.

edit.slugChangeWarning: Changing the slug breaks existing links to this organization. There is no automatic redirect from the old slug.

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.description: Deleting an organization is permanent. Members lose access immediately.

delete.confirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. All members lose access immediately and there is no restore.

noAccess.title: You can't change this organization
noAccess.description: Only members with update or delete permissions can edit settings.

empty.title: No organizations yet
empty.description: Create one to start inviting members.

create.title: Create organization
create.description: Pick a name and a URL slug. The slug can be changed later, but existing links will break.

slug.label: Slug
slug.hint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and single hyphens.
slug.invalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and single hyphens. No leading or trailing hyphens.
